waiind 0.0.0.9000

Harmonized Swiss indicator dataset for the WAI model

Source: R/data.R
data_ch_dataset.Rd

The curated, model-ready dataset shipped with the package. Mixed-frequency time series are harmonized to the project conventions (weekly series use 48 observations per year) and transformed according to the variable metadata in data-raw/data_meta.csv (see the data dictionary in README.md for the per-series source, category, unit, and transformation).

Usage

data_ch_dataset

Format

A list with two components, as expected by hfdfm():

flows

Named list of 45 ts objects treated as flow variables. The quarterly GDP target series is not included; the analysis scripts add it at runtime from the real-time GDP vintage database that ships with the package at system.file("extdata", "realtime_gdp.csv", package = "waiind") (see get_real_time_gdp_vintages()).

stocks

Named list of 7 ts objects treated as stock variables.

Source

Produced from SECO, KOF, FSO, SNB, Datastream and further high-frequency sources; see the data dictionary in README.md for the per-series source and metadata.

On this page

Developed by Philipp Kronenberg.
